title: verbascum × tommasinianum
intro: Verbascum × tommasinianum, also known as Tommasini's mullein, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, characterized by its large, yellow or white flowers and woolly leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. Consuming Tommasini's mullein has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Tommasini's mullein can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues.
